title: Wizard School Detention Slip
text:
## Wizard School Detention Slip

Student: {person}

Offense: using a {adjective} spell to turn {number} {plural noun} into a {color} {animal} during class.

The student claimed they meant to {verb} a harmless {object}, but the witness saw them {verb ending in -ing} behind the {place}.

Punishment: clean the enchanted {noun}, apologize to the {job}, and write I will not {verb} with my {body part} {number} times.

Mood observed: {emotion}. Wand color: {color}. Snack confiscated: {food}.
